en: Now when Jesus learned that the Pharisees had heard that Jesus was making and baptizing more disciples than John
zh: 主知道法利賽人聽見他收門徒和施洗比約翰更多 ，

en: (although Jesus himself did not baptize, but only his disciples),
he left Judea and departed again for Galilee.
zh: 就離開了猶太，再往加利利去。

en: And he had to pass through Samaria.
zh: 他必須經過撒瑪利亞。

en: So he came to a town of Samaria called Sychar, near the field that Jacob had given to his son Joseph.
zh: 於是到了撒瑪利亞的一座城，名叫敘加；這城靠近雅各給他兒子約瑟的那塊地。

en: Jacob's well was there; so Jesus, wearied as he was from his journey, was sitting beside the well. It was about the sixth hour.
zh: 在那裡有雅各井。耶穌因為旅途疲倦了，就坐在井旁；那時大約正午。

en: There came a woman of Samaria to draw water. Jesus said to her, "Give me a drink."
zh: 有一個撒瑪利亞婦人來打水。耶穌對她說：“請給我水喝。”

en: (For his disciples had gone away into the city to buy food.)
zh: 那時，他的門徒都進城買食物去了。

en: The Samaritan woman said to him, "How is it that you, a Jew, ask for a drink from me, a woman of Samaria?" (For Jews have no dealings with Samaritans.)
zh: 撒瑪利亞婦人對耶穌說：“你是猶太人，怎麼向我，一個撒瑪利亞婦人要水喝呢？”

en: Jesus answered her, "If you knew the gift of God, and who it is that is saying to you, 'Give me a drink,' you would have asked him, and he would have given you living water."
zh: 耶穌回答她：“你若知道 神的恩賜，和對你說‘請給我水喝’的是誰，你必早已求他，他也必早把活水賜給你了。”

en: The woman said to him, "Sir, you have nothing to draw water with, and the well is deep. Where do you get that living water?
zh: 婦人說：“先生，你沒有打水的器具，井又深，你從哪裡得活水呢？

en: Are you greater than our father Jacob? He gave us the well and drank from it himself, as did his sons and his livestock."
zh: 我們的祖先雅各把這口井留給我們，他自己和子孫以及牲畜都喝這井的水，難道你比他還大嗎？”

en: Jesus said to her, "Everyone who drinks of this water will be thirsty again,
zh: 耶穌回答：“凡喝這水的，還要再渴；

en: but whoever drinks of the water that I will give him will never be thirsty forever. The water that I will give him will become in him a spring of water welling up to eternal life."
zh: 人若喝我所賜的水，就永遠不渴。我所賜的水要在他裡面成為湧流的泉源，直湧到永生。”

en: The woman said to him, "Sir, give me this water, so that I will not be thirsty or have to come here to draw water."
zh: 婦人說：“先生，請把這水賜給我，使我不渴，也不用來這裡打水。”

en: Jesus said to her, "Go, call your husband, and come here."
zh: 耶穌說：“你去，叫你的丈夫，然後回到這裡來。”

en: The woman answered him, "I have no husband." Jesus said to her, "You are right in saying, 'I have no husband';
zh: 婦人對他說：“我沒有丈夫。”耶穌說：“你說‘沒有丈夫’是不錯的。

en: for you have had five husbands, and the one you now have is not your husband. What you have said is true."
zh: 你以前有五個丈夫，現在有的並不是你的丈夫；你說這話是真的。”

en: The woman said to him, "Sir, I perceive that you are a prophet.
zh: 婦人說：“先生，我看出你是先知。

en: Our fathers worshiped on this mountain, but you say that in Jerusalem is the place where people ought to worship."
zh: 我們的祖先在這山上敬拜 神，而你們卻說，敬拜的地方必須在耶路撒冷。”

en: Jesus said to her, "Woman, believe me, the hour is coming when neither on this mountain nor in Jerusalem will you worship the Father.
zh: 耶穌說：“婦人，你應當信我，時候將到，那時你們敬拜父，不在這山上，也不在耶路撒冷。

en: You worship what you do not know; we worship what we know, for salvation is from the Jews.
zh: 你們敬拜你們所不知道的，我們卻敬拜我們所知道的，因為救恩是從猶太人出來的。

en: But the hour is coming, and is now here, when the true worshipers will worship the Father in spirit and truth, for the Father is seeking such people to worship him.
zh: 然而時候將到，現在就是了，那用心靈按真理敬拜父的，才是真正敬拜的人；因為父在尋找這樣敬拜他的人。

en: God is spirit, and those who worship him must worship in spirit and truth."
zh: 神是靈，敬拜他的必須藉著靈按真理敬拜他。”

en: The woman said to him, "I know that Messiah is coming (he who is called Christ). When he comes, he will tell us all things."
zh: 婦人說：“我知道那稱為基督的彌賽亞要來；他來了，要把一切都告訴我們。”

en: Jesus said to her, "I who speak to you am he."
zh: 耶穌說：“我這現在跟你說話的就是他。”

en: Just then his disciples came back. They marveled that he was talking with a woman, but no one said, "What do you seek?" or, "Why are you talking with her?"
zh: 正在這時候，門徒回來了，見耶穌和一個婦人說話，就很希奇；但是沒有人問：“你要甚麼？”或說：“你為甚麼跟她說話？”

en: So the woman left her water jar and went away into town and said to the people,
zh: 那婦人撇下了她的水罐，進到城裡去，對眾人說：

en: "Come, see a man who told me all that I ever did. Can this be the Christ?"
zh: “你們來，看看一個人，他把我所作的一切都說出來，難道這人就是基督嗎？”

en: They went out of the town and were coming to him.
zh: 眾人就出城，往耶穌那裡去。

en: Meanwhile the disciples were urging him, saying, "Rabbi, eat."
zh: 當時，門徒對耶穌說：“拉比，請吃。”

en: But he said to them, "I have food to eat that you do not know about."
zh: 耶穌說：“我有食物吃，是你們所不知道的。”

en: So the disciples said to one another, "Has anyone brought him something to eat?"
zh: 門徒就彼此說：“難道有人拿東西給他吃了嗎？”

en: Jesus said to them, "My food is to do the will of him who sent me and to accomplish his work.
zh: 耶穌說：“我的食物就是遵行差我來者的旨意，並且完成他的工作。

en: Do you not say, 'There are yet four months, then comes the harvest'? Look, I tell you, lift up your eyes, and see that the fields are white for harvest.
zh: 你們不是說‘還有四個月才到收穫的時候’嗎？我告訴你們，舉目向田觀看，莊稼已經熟了，可以收割了。

en: Already the one who reaps is receiving wages and gathering fruit for eternal life, so that sower and reaper may rejoice together.
zh: 收割的人得到工資，也積儲五穀直到永生，使撒種的和收割的一同快樂。

en: For here the saying holds true, 'One sows and another reaps.'
zh: ‘這人撒種，那人收割’，這話是真的。

en: I sent you to reap that for which you did not labor. Others have labored, and you have entered into their labor."
zh: 我派你們去收割你們所沒有勞苦的；別人勞苦，你們卻享受他們勞苦的成果。”

en: Many Samaritans from that town believed in him because of the woman's testimony, "He told me all that I ever did."
zh: 因著那婦人作見證的話：“他把我所作的一切都說出來了”，那城裡就有許多撒瑪利亞人信了耶穌。

en: So when the Samaritans came to him, they asked him to stay with them, and he stayed there two days.
zh: 於是他們來到耶穌那裡，求他和他們同住，耶穌就在那裡住了兩天。

en: And many more believed because of his word.
zh: 因著耶穌的話，信他的人就更多了。

en: They said to the woman, "It is no longer because of what you said that we believe, for we have heard for ourselves, and we know that this is indeed the Savior of the world."
zh: 他們就對那婦人說：“現在我們信，不再是因為你的話，而是因為我們親自聽見了，知道這位真是世人的救主。”

en: After the two days he departed for Galilee.
zh: 兩天之後，耶穌離開那裡，往加利利去。

en: (For Jesus himself had testified that a prophet has no honor in his own hometown.)
zh: 耶穌自己說過：“先知在本鄉是不受尊敬的。”

en: So when he came to Galilee, the Galileans welcomed him, having seen all that he had done in Jerusalem at the feast. For they too had gone to the feast.
zh: 耶穌到了加利利的時候，加利利人都歡迎他，因為他們曾經上耶路撒冷去過節，見過他所行的一切。

en: So he came again to Cana in Galilee, where he had made the water wine. And at Capernaum there was an official whose son was ill.
zh: 耶穌又到了加利利的迦拿，就是他變水為酒的地方。有一個大臣，他的兒子在迦百農患病。

en: When this man heard that Jesus had come from Judea to Galilee, he went to him and asked him to come down and heal his son, for he was at the point of death.
zh: 他聽見耶穌從猶太到了加利利，就來見他，求他下去醫治他的兒子，因為他的兒子快要死了。

en: So Jesus said to him, "Unless you see signs and wonders you will not believe."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“你們若看不見神蹟奇事，總是不肯信。”

en: The official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies."
zh: 大臣說：“先生，求你趁我的孩子還沒有死就下去吧！”

en: Jesus said to him, "Go; your son will live." The man believed the word that Jesus spoke to him and went on his way.
zh: 耶穌告訴他：“回去吧，你的兒子好了。”那人信耶穌對他說的話，就回去了。

en: As he was going down, his servants met him and told him that his son was recovering.
zh: 正下去的時候，他的僕人迎著他走來，說他的孩子好了。

en: So he asked them the hour when he began to get better, and they said to him, "Yesterday at the seventh hour the fever left him."
zh: 他就向僕人查問孩子是甚麼時候好轉的。他們告訴他：“昨天下午一點鐘，熱就退了。”

en: The father knew that was the hour when Jesus had said to him, "Your son will live." And he himself believed, and all his household.
zh: 這父親就知道，那正是耶穌告訴他“你的兒子好了”的時候，他自己和全家就信了。

en: This was now the second sign that Jesus did when he had come from Judea to Galilee.
zh: 這是耶穌從猶太回到加利利以後所行的第二件神蹟。
